name: Nightshift Foundry
notes: Phase grow. Named at ADR-011. Slug 'foundry' immutable. 10 plugins shipped across 4 categories (workflow/quality/context/meta). i217 (ADR-025, operator-directed PR): the window reimagined for the first-time visitor - Nightshift Foundry brand EVOLVED not replaced (kept name/slug/kraft palette; sans typography + ember CTA; monospace only for code/telemetry). New IA is a conversion funnel: hero defines Claude Code + plugins in plain language, 30-second primer + before/after, 3-step install, shelf grouped by category with benefit-led cards, kits, trust section, telemetry demoted to 'Under the hood'. Honesty preserved (no inflated stats; substantiated only). All test-pinned machinery kept; qa 257 ok. window v0.6 -> v0.7. Gate left: Claude secret (CI token).

theme.name: Repo hygiene
theme.note: Plugins that surface the quiet debt a codebase accumulates — stale TODOs, missing tests, drifted toolchains, unreviewed dep bumps — and make it legible before it bites.
